creator: mishin@mh.net.ru
text:
Created attachment 218709
Diff-file for new misc/bh1750-kmod port

FreeBSD kernel driver for a bh1750 sensor on i2c bus.

It makes the sensor to measure ambient light every N seconds and updates a
corresponding sysctl(8) variables. You may manage the measurement by corresponding sysctl variables.

For building the port You need the kernel sources installed into /usr/src.

WWW: https://gitlab.com/alexandermishin13/bh1750-kmod
